attribution_label: OS platform vendor updated the system CA bundle via a platform security update.
affected_sessions_label: Enterprise TLS routes using OS roots require revalidation; local editing and non-TLS work continue without interruption.
local_continuity_label: Local editing, file operations, search, and non-TLS routes continue unaffected. Enterprise TLS routes using OS roots will revalidate on the next connection attempt.
repair_action_label: Wait for the OS platform update to complete, then revalidate TLS routes against the updated OS root bundle. No user action is required unless a route fails after revalidation.

attribution_label: Admin policy bundle was updated with a new custom CA bundle for enterprise TLS routes.
affected_sessions_label: Enterprise TLS routes validated against the custom CA bundle require revalidation; all other routes and local work are unaffected.
local_continuity_label: Local editing and OS-root TLS routes remain fully available. Enterprise routes pinned to the custom CA bundle revalidate on the next connection attempt.
repair_action_label: Apply the updated custom CA bundle declared by the current managed policy, then revalidate enterprise TLS routes. Contact the workspace admin if revalidation fails.

attribution_label: A new SSH host proof was added by admin policy for a managed Git-over-SSH endpoint.
affected_sessions_label: New Git-over-SSH sessions to the enrolled managed endpoint are now protected by the pinned host proof; existing sessions are unaffected.
local_continuity_label: Local editing, HTTPS-based Git routes, and all non-SSH work continue unaffected. The new host proof only applies to future SSH sessions to the enrolled endpoint.
repair_action_label: No repair action is required; the new SSH host proof was added successfully.

attribution_label: Client certificate was renewed by admin policy; the previous certificate approached its expiry and was replaced with a fresh enrollment.
affected_sessions_label: Active mTLS sessions may need to re-present the renewed certificate on the next handshake; local editing and non-mTLS routes are unaffected.
local_continuity_label: Local editing, local file operations, and non-mTLS routes remain fully available. Only mTLS routes to managed endpoints require re-presentation of the renewed certificate on the next connection.
repair_action_label: The renewed client certificate has been enrolled in the OS keychain. Re-present the certificate on the next mTLS connection attempt. No user action is required if the OS keychain is unlocked.

attribution_label: Mirror trust root was refreshed via a signed mirror-sync transport; the admin-signed bundle was updated with a current mirror root.
affected_sessions_label: Mirror-sync and air-gapped artifact routes will revalidate against the updated mirror trust root on the next sync attempt; local editing is unaffected.
local_continuity_label: Local editing, OS-root TLS routes, and enterprise routes not using mirror trust roots remain fully available. Only mirror-sync and air-gapped artifact routes revalidate on the next sync.
repair_action_label: The mirror trust root has been refreshed via the signed mirror-sync transport. Mirror-sync and air-gapped artifact routes will revalidate on the next sync attempt. No user action is required.
